name: King Whamon

signature_move.name: WaJet
signature_move.description: Attacks with an ultra-high pressure spout.

description: An Ultimate-level Whamon that has built a habitable island upon itself due to the fact that many Digimon would catch a ride inside its mouth as a Whamon while traveling through Net Space . Even when diving into the ocean depths, it will protect Digimon by surrounding the island in a large bubble. However, if someone causes a dispute on the island, it will forcefully eject them by spouting them. Its Special Moves are attacking with an ultra-high pressure spout ( WaJet ), and charging with its hard, rock face head ( Ride Right ).
